title: KimetsuCraft - KC
description: Kimetsu No Yaiba Mod! By Nabkami
body:
Master a Breathing Style, forge your Nichirin Sword, climb the ranks and hunt demons.

KimetsuCraft is a Demon Slayer combat mod built around its own progression, techniques and enemies.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1501048/description_bedada0f-265d-4439-a862-60f1064dcbf9.png)

***

The mod adds a variety of new features:

- Breathing Styles: Water and Flame, 8 forms each, with custom animations and VFX. More styles on the way.
- Nichirin Swords: forged from Nichirin Ore and shaped by six stats that change how they feel in combat.
- NPCs and demons: Giyu and Rengoku fight on their own, chain forms and react to the player. Demons come in three tiers, each with hidden tricks.
- Wisteria biomes: Wisteria Forest and Wisteria Oasis generate in the Overworld, home to three Wisteria wood variants and the Nichirin Forge.
- In-game configuration: tweak every balance value, technique parameter and NPC profile from a GUI. No config files, no restarts.
- Rank ladder: 11 tiers from Mizunoto to Hashira, earned through real fights.
    

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1501048/description_645e399b-497b-487d-8468-7dcd3bc61ea5.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f8c891c2-6010-4b28-9608-d070d19c539c.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a0bb8541-9624-4a50-8650-916c8a2903a4.png)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1501048/description_96c29b94-d7c2-42b0-b5cb-7d3cb2b1d4c3.png)

## Requirements / Dependances

Recommended versions: GeckoLib 4.8.2 · Player Animator 1.0.2 · BendyLib · 4.0.0 AAA Particles 1.4.11 (Effekseer VFX)

  

## FAQ

**Does it work on servers?** Yes, networking is built for multiplayer from the ground up.

**What about shaders?** Embeddium + Oculus is the recommended setup. OptiFine may have glitches with GeckoLib models depending on the version.

**Can I use it in a modpack?** Yes. Everything is configurable and built to coexist with other mods.

## Permissions

**You may**

*   Use this mod in modpacks, as long as you link back to the official CurseForge or Modrinth page
*   Create videos or content featuring this mod with credit and a link to the official page
*   Use this mod as reference or inspiration for your own original work

**You may not**

*   Reupload or redistribute this mod on any platform without explicit written permission
*   Extract, reuse, or redistribute any assets from this mod (textures, models, sounds, icons) without explicit written permission
*   Claim authorship or ownership of any part of this mod
*   Publish modified versions of this mod publicly without explicit written permission

_Assets include but are not limited to: textures, 3D models, sounds, icons, and visual effects._
